text: 🇺🇦 💥 Ukrainian channels report strikes in several districts of Kiev 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 乌克兰频道报道基辅多个地区遭到袭击 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇺 AFP: Australia says it will boost spending on drones by up to A$5 billion as part of a broader push to adapt to changes in modern warfare. Defense Minister Richard Marles said the move is driven by lessons from conflicts in the Middle East and Ukraine…" ⚡️ 🇦🇺 Australia will raise defence spending to 3% of GDP by 2033, Defence Minister Richard Marles said, adding the plan includes major new investment in drones and autonomous systems. The government said the shift will require about A$53 billion (S$48.39 billion) in additional spending over the next decade, with A$14 billion allocated over the next four years, and noted the calculation now aligns with NATO standards that include defence-related costs like pensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇺 法新社：澳大利亚表示，作为适应现代战争变化更广泛推动力的一部分，将增加高达50亿澳元的无人机支出。国防部长理查德·马尔斯（Richard Marles）表示，此举是受中东和乌克兰冲突经验教训的驱动……” ⚡️ 🇦🇺 国防部长理查德·马尔斯表示，澳大利亚将在2033年前将国防支出提高到GDP的3%，并补充说该计划包括对无人机和自主系统的大规模新投资。政府表示，这一转变将在未来十年内需要约530亿澳元（约合483.9亿新元）的额外支出，其中未来四年将拨款140亿澳元，并指出目前的计算方式现已与北约标准保持一致，其中包括养老金等与国防相关的费用。@wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical USAF bunker art from Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan. Hashmarks indicate the number of Iranian air raid warnings by day, with 89 total by March 15th. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044631377467863478/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 来自约旦穆瓦法克·萨尔蒂（Muwaffaq Salti）空军基地的美国空军掩体艺术。井字标记表示伊朗空袭警报的每日次数，截至3月15日总计89次。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044631377467863478/photo/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ #Summary for April 16, 2026 ▪️ In the past day, the enemy launched around 400 strike drones and missiles at its rear areas. At night, we struck Kyiv, Kharkiv, Dnipro, and Odesa. ▪️ The AFU sent drones at night to Sevastopol , Crimea , and Krasnodar . In Tuapse , two children were killed, two adults injured, and buildings damaged. The enemy is distributing footage of a fire in the Tuapse Refinery area. Classes in schools have been canceled. In Loo, drone debris fell at several addresses. ▪️ In the Sumy direction , the Sever Group is fighting in Shostka, Sumy, and Novodmitrivka. The enemy is transferring strike drone operators and forcibly mobilizing Territorial Defense. ▪️ In Belgorod , drones attacked agricultural enterprises, vehicles, and homes, injuring several people. Numerous areas are under AFU strikes. ▪️ In the Kharkiv direction , the Sever Group claims the capture of Volchansk Khutory . Combat continues near the border and in forest belts east of Syminivka. Our troops have tactical successes in the Velykobourluk sector. ▪️ In the Kupiansk direction , positional combat is ongoing in the city and to the south. ▪️ In the Slavyansk direction , fierce fighting continues for the breakthrough toward Rai-Aleksandrivka. The AFU counterattacks, but our forces straightened the front line in the Kalenyk – Kriva Luka area. ▪️ In the Kostyantynivka direction , combat is ongoing along previous lines. The enemy is pulling reinforcements into the city under drone strikes. ▪️ In Dnipropetrovsk , the Vostok Group continues to expand control toward Lisne. ▪️ In east Zaporizhia - offensive operations in the directions of Komsomolske and Charyvne. ▪️ On the Zaporizhia front - positional combat in the Prymorskyy and Stepnohorsk area. AFU counterattacks have negated previous Russian successes. The enemy strikes at energy infrastructure, leaving most of the region without power. ▪️ In Kherson , a drone strike on a car resulted in civilian injuries. Dozens of areas came under fire. Summary by: Two Majors ✨ Two Majors on MAX Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar in English: 转发自 @ #2026年4月16日总结 ▪️ 过去一天，敌方在其后方区域发射了约400架攻击无人机和导弹。夜间，我们袭击了基辅、哈尔科夫、第聂伯罗和敖德萨。 ▪️ 乌克兰武装部队夜间向塞瓦斯托波尔、克里米亚和克拉斯诺达尔派遣了无人机。在图阿普谢，两名儿童死亡，两名成人受伤，建筑物受损。敌方正在散布图阿普谢炼油厂区域火灾的画面。学校课程已取消。在洛奥，无人机残骸坠落在多个地点。 ▪️ 在苏梅方向，北方部队集团正在肖斯特卡、苏梅和新德米特里夫卡作战。敌方正在调动攻击无人机操作员并强制动员领土防卫部队。 ▪️ 在别尔哥罗德，无人机袭击了农业企业、车辆和住宅，造成数人受伤。多个地区遭到乌克兰武装部队的打击。 ▪️ 在哈尔科夫方向，北方部队集团声称占领了沃尔昌斯克胡托里。边境附近及西米尼夫卡以东的林带战斗仍在继续。我们的部队在大布尔卢克区取得了战术性进展。 ▪️ 在库皮扬斯克方向，城市内及南部地区正在进行阵地战。 ▪️ 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，向赖-亚历山德里夫卡突破的激烈战斗仍在继续。乌克兰武装部队进行反击，但我们的部队在卡列尼克-克里瓦卢卡地区拉直了前线。 ▪️ 在康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向，战斗沿着之前的防线进行。敌方正在无人机打击下向城内调集增援部队。 ▪️ 在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克，东方部队集团继续向利斯内方向扩大控制范围。 ▪️ 在扎波罗热东部 - 向共青团村和查里夫内方向进行进攻行动。 ▪️ 在扎波罗热前线 - 在普里莫尔斯基和斯捷普诺戈尔斯克地区进行阵地战。乌克兰武装部队的反击抵消了俄罗斯之前的战果。敌方袭击了能源基础设施，导致该地区大部分地区断电。 ▪️ 在赫尔松，一次无人机对车辆的袭击导致平民受伤。数十个地区遭到炮火袭击。总结：Two Majors ✨ Two Majors on MAX 原始消息

text: 🐻 Everything important you need to know about the past 24 hours: ➡️ JD Vance explains what Trump means when he says the Epstein thing is a hoax ➡️ Zelensky remembers his career in comedy ➡️ Ukrainian analyst explains why Ukraine mobilizes a lot of people every month but it doesn't really make a difference ➡️ Iran has been intensively removing debris from the entrances to its underground missile facilities ➡️ Trump claims Xi agreed not to supply weapons to Iran , and announces he is stopping the blockade for China and the good of the world ➡️ The Iranian Foreign Ministry representative did not confirm media reports about an agreement with the US to extend the ceasefire ➡️ Russia and Azerbaijan have reached a settlement on the consequences of the plane crash in December 2024, which soured relations between the two countries ➡️ Mike Johnson defends Trump attacking the Pope , and the White House should stop trying to explain things because they only make it worse ➡️ Budanov continues to go against Zelensky ➡️ The US is threatening Chinese banks ➡️ Russia’s Defense Ministry released locations of European, Israeli, and Turkish facilities tied to Ukrainian companies producing drones used for strikes against Russia. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 过去24小时内你需要知道的所有重要事项：➡️ JD·万斯解释了特朗普所说的“爱泼斯坦事件是骗局”是什么意思 ➡️ 泽连斯基回忆起他的喜剧生涯 ➡️ 乌克兰分析人士解释了为什么乌克兰每月动员大量人员却收效甚微 ➡️ 伊朗一直在加紧清理其地下导弹设施入口处的瓦砾 ➡️ 特朗普声称习近平已同意不向伊朗提供武器，并宣布他将为了中国和世界的利益停止封锁 ➡️ 伊朗外交部代表未证实有关与美国达成延长停火协议的媒体报道 ➡️ 俄罗斯和阿塞拜疆就2024年12月导致两国关系恶化的飞机失事后果达成了和解 ➡️ 迈克·约翰逊为特朗普攻击教皇的行为辩护，并称白宫应停止试图解释，因为只会越描越黑 ➡️ 布达诺夫继续与泽连斯基唱反调 ➡️ 美国正在威胁中国银行 ➡️ 俄罗斯国防部公布了欧洲、以色列和土耳其与乌克兰无人机生产公司有关的设施位置，这些无人机被用于袭击俄罗斯。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says that the leaders of Israel and Lebanon will speak tomorrow: "Trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044621056095248548/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender According to U.S President Donald J. Trump, the leaders of Lebanon and Israel are set to speak tomorrow. The president made the announcement on his Truth Social app. This comes amidst the ongoing Israel-Lebanon negotiations centered around the disarmament of Lebanese Hezbollah and the end of the conflict in Southern Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普称，黎巴嫩和以色列领导人定于明天对话。总统是在他的“真实社交”（Truth Social）应用上宣布这一消息的。此举正值围绕黎巴嫩真主党解除武装和结束黎巴嫩南部冲突的以黎谈判进行之际。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: Trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon. It has been a long time since the two leaders have spoken, like 34 years. It will happen tomorrow. Nice! President DJT." Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044619888522592350/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“试图在以色列和黎巴嫩之间争取一点喘息空间。两位领导人已经很久没有对话了，大约34年了。明天就会发生。不错！DJT总统。” 由 @AZ_Intel_ 贡献。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044619888522592350/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters: Analysts say Iran could withstand a full halt to oil exports for up to two months before being forced to cut production after the U.S. began blocking shipping in and out of Iranian ports on April 13. They estimate Iran has about 90 million barrels of onshore crude storage capacity, meaning exports could initially be diverted into storage until tanks are filled, at which point output would need to be reduced. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 路透社：分析人士称，自4月13日美国开始封锁伊朗港口进出航运以来，伊朗在被迫减产前，最多可承受长达两个月的石油出口全面中断。他们估计伊朗拥有约9000万桶陆上原油储存能力，这意味着出口最初可以转入储存，直到储罐装满，届时将不得不减产。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NYP: U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. once said he cut off a dead raccoon’s genitals during a family road trip so he could “study them later,” according to a new biography citing his personal journals. The account adds to previously reported incidents involving animal carcasses, including his admission to dumping a dead bear cub in Central Park years earlier. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NYP：据一本引用其个人日记的新传记显示，美国卫生部长小罗伯特·F·肯尼迪（Robert F. Kennedy Jr.）曾表示，他在一次家庭公路旅行中切下了一只死浣熊的生殖器，以便“以后研究”。这一说法增加了此前报道的涉及动物尸体的事件，包括他承认多年前在中央公园丢弃了一只死熊崽。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor China says this never happened, and it’s not the first time the president has made similar claims later denied by the other parties involved. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044607519985672529/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 中国表示这从未发生过，而且这已经不是总统第一次做出类似声明，随后又被其他相关方否认了。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044607519985672529/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Southern Command (SOUTHCOM), earlier today, at the direction of SOUTHCOM Commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations earlier today in the Eastern Pacific. Per the release, the vessel was operating in known narco-trafficking routes and was engaged in trafficking. 3 narcotics-terrorists were killed in the strike. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国南方司令部（SOUTHCOM）发布的消息，今天早些时候，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万（Francis L. Donovan）将军的指挥下，南方之矛联合特遣部队在东太平洋对一艘由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了打击。根据发布的消息，该船只在已知的毒品走私路线上航行并从事走私活动。打击中有3名毒品恐怖分子被击毙。推文

text: WarMonitor The Senate voted 40–59 to reject a resolution blocking arms sales to Israel, with all Republicans opposing it and most Democrats supporting it. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 参议院以40票对59票否决了一项阻止向以色列出售武器的决议，所有共和党人投了反对票，大多数民主党人投了支持票。推文

text: Stephen Miller almost says that Trump is seeking a "final solution" in Iran but then catches himself 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: Stephen Miller 差点说特朗普正在伊朗寻求“最终解决方案”，但随后意识到并改口了 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 SOUTHCOM released footage of a strike against a suspected narcotics trafficking vessel in the Eastern Pacific ocean earlier this Wednesday. Three narcotics traffickers were killed in the strike. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 南方司令部发布了本周三早些时候在东太平洋对一艘涉嫌毒品走私的船只进行打击的视频。打击中有三名毒品走私者被击毙。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 US Senate Blocks Sanders-Led Resolutions to Halt $450M in Arms Sales to Israel (40-59 and 36-63). 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ US Senate Blocks Sanders-Led Resolutions to Halt $450M in Arms Sales to Israel (40-59 and 36-63)

text: WarMonitor The administration has abruptly canceled an $11M contract with Catholic Charities to care for unaccompanied migrant children, ending a decades-long partnership with the Catholic Church. (Miami Herald) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044598324565586007/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 政府突然取消了与天主教慈善机构价值1100万美元的照顾无人陪伴移民儿童的合同，结束了与天主教会长达数十年的合作关系。（迈阿密先驱报）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044598324565586007/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor MTG says death threats against her children escalated after Trump labeled her a “traitor,” and alleges that when she contacted him, he showed no sympathy and blamed her, saying she’d be responsible if her son were killed. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044597170636992551/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor MTG表示，在特朗普称她为“叛徒”后，针对她孩子的死亡威胁升级了，并声称当她联系他时，他没有表现出任何同情，反而指责她，说如果她的儿子被杀，她要负责。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044597170636992551/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor The term “final solution” was the Nazi regime’s phrase for the systematic extermination of Jews during the Holocaust, so using it today carries direct associations with genocide. Stephen Miller almost says that Trump is seeking a "final solution" in Iran but then catches himself https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2044585207005692080/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor “最终解决方案”一词是纳粹政权在大屠杀期间系统性灭绝犹太人的用语，因此今天使用它带有与种族灭绝的直接关联。Stephen Miller 差点说特朗普正在伊朗寻求“最终解决方案”，但随后意识到并改口了 https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2044585207005692080/video/1 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi thanked China for blocking a U.N. Security Council resolution on reopening the Strait of Hormuz during a call with his Chinese counterpart. He warned of “dangerous consequences” from U.S. actions in the Persian Gulf, while calling China’s veto, alongside Russia, effective in preventing escalation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）在与中国外长通话时，感谢中国阻止了联合国安理会关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的决议。他警告称美国在波斯湾的行动将带来“危险后果”，同时称中国与俄罗斯的否决票在防止局势升级方面是有效的。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱The U.S. Senate voted against a motion to stop arms sales to Israel with 59 voting against and 40 in favour. @wfwithess" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 U.S. Senator Bernie Sanders on failed senate vote to stop U.S. arms sales to Israel: We are making progress. Today, more than 80% of the Democratic caucus stood with the American people and voted to block U.S. military aid to Netanyahu and his horrific, illegal wars. When we started this effort there were just 11 votes. Now, there are 40. That shift reflects where the American people are. Americans, whether they are Democrats, Republicans or Independents, want to see our tax money invested in improving lives here at home - not used to kill innocent women and children in the Middle East and put American troops in harm's way as part of Netanyahu's illegal wars of expansion. What's astonishing is that, despite overwhelming opposition across this country, Republicans continue to side with Netanyahu and Trump. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱美国参议院投票反对停止向以色列出售武器的动议，59票反对，40票赞成。@wfwithess” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 美国参议员伯尼·桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）就参议院未能通过停止向以色列出售美国武器的投票表示：我们正在取得进展。今天，超过80%的民主党核心小组成员与美国人民站在一起，投票阻止美国向内塔尼亚胡及其可怕的非法战争提供军事援助。当我们开始这项努力时，只有11票。现在，有40票。这种转变反映了美国人民的立场。美国人，无论是民主党人、共和党人还是独立人士，都希望看到我们的税款投资于改善国内生活——而不是用于在中东杀害无辜的妇女和儿童，并将美国军队置于危险之中，作为内塔尼亚胡非法扩张战争的一部分。令人震惊的是，尽管全国范围内存在压倒性的反对意见，共和党人仍然站在内塔尼亚胡和特朗普一边。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WSJ: The Pentagon has begun discussions with major U.S. manufacturers, including companies like General Motors, Ford, GE Aerospace and Oshkosh, to boost weapons production as military demand rises. Talks are still preliminary but focus on using commercial factories, workforce, and industrial capacity to support the production of munitions and military equipment. The effort is aimed at investigating if commercial industry could boost the U.S. defence industrial base, which has been strained by ongoing conflicts, including the war in Iran and continued support for Ukraine. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WSJ：五角大楼已开始与通用汽车、福特、GE航空和奥什科什等美国主要制造商进行讨论，以随着军事需求的增加提高武器产量。谈判仍处于初步阶段，但重点是利用商业工厂、劳动力和工业能力来支持弹药和军事装备的生产。此举旨在调查商业工业是否能提振美国国防工业基础，该基础因持续的冲突（包括伊朗战争和对乌克兰的持续支持）而承受压力。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Fox News’ Jennifer Griffin has confirmed Iran used a Chinese spy satellite to monitor U.S. bases in the Middle East last month after the IRGC gained access shortly after launch. https://x.com/Acyn/status/2044546090155053504/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 福克斯新闻的詹妮弗·格里芬（Jennifer Griffin）证实，伊朗在上个月伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）发射后不久获得访问权限，利用中国间谍卫星监视了美国在中东的基地。https://x.com/Acyn/status/2044546090155053504/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Hotels in U.S. World Cup host cities are cutting room rates after demand came in weaker than expected, with industry insiders pointing to growing hesitation about traveling to the U.S. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国世界杯主办城市的酒店正在下调房价，因为需求低于预期，业内人士指出人们对前往美国旅行的犹豫情绪日益增加。推文

text: "We are all hostages of this apocalyptic death cult." Pepe Escobar on Ben-Gvir praying at Al-Aqsa and the building momentum toward a Third Temple false flag. Egypt and Jordan, won't lift a finger. "They are preparing the terrain for a false flag to destroy Al-Aqsa. The only way to prevent it would be a devastating military victory against Israel—arrest all these people, install a war crimes tribunal. We have to find a solution, but I won't go as far as inserting the adjective final, but we have to find a solution for them...." FULL EPISODE !! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: “我们都是这个末日死亡邪教的人质。” Pepe Escobar 谈论本-格维尔（Ben-Gvir）在阿克萨清真寺祈祷以及建立第三圣殿假旗行动的势头。埃及和约旦不会动一根手指。“他们正在为摧毁阿克萨清真寺的假旗行动准备地形。防止它的唯一方法是对以色列取得毁灭性的军事胜利——逮捕所有这些人，设立战争罪法庭。我们必须找到一个解决方案，但我不会走得太远去插入‘最终’这个形容词，但我们必须为他们找到一个解决方案……” 完整剧集！！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 TankerTrackers: A non-Iranian VLCC supertanker, capable of carrying around “2 million barrels” of crude and sanctioned by the US OFAC, has entered Iranian waters via the Strait of Hormuz with AIS active. The movement was identified and verified through…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 TankerTrackers: A tanker belonging to Iran successfully passed through the blockade, transiting the Strait of Hormuz today. Several sanction complaint tankers have steered towards Iraq with their AIS transponders off, away from the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 TankerTrackers：一艘非伊朗籍的VLCC超级油轮，能够运载约‘200万桶’原油，并受到美国OFAC制裁，已在AIS开启的情况下通过霍尔木兹海峡进入伊朗水域。该动向已通过……识别并核实” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 TankerTrackers：一艘属于伊朗的油轮今天成功通过封锁，穿过了霍尔木兹海峡。几艘符合制裁规定的油轮已关闭AIS应答器，避开封锁，驶向伊拉克。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 "Extending the ceasefire is not in our interest at all. I am absolutely not in favor of a ceasefire." Mohsen Rezaei: We must shorten the days. We must intensify the pressure. Right now, our brothers have aimed the launchers at the Abraham Lincoln and all the vesselsm all the vessels are now under our launchers. "We will sink all of them. We won't let a single one escape from us." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “延长停火根本不符合我们的利益。我绝对不支持停火。” 莫森·雷扎伊（Mohsen Rezaei）：我们必须缩短天数。我们必须加强压力。现在，我们的兄弟已经将发射器对准了亚伯拉罕·林肯号和所有的船只，所有的船只现在都在我们的发射器之下。“我们将击沉它们所有人。我们不会让任何一个从我们手中逃脱。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
